meta.title: Caring Community
meta.description: Configure the integrated care hub, dependent capabilities, and municipal reporting surfaces.

about.title: About this page
about.body: The Caring Community module enables your timebank to coordinate informal neighbourhood care, matching residents who need help with trusted members who can provide it. It adds a trust-tier system, coordinator workflow, pilot evaluation tools, and municipal reporting on top of your existing timebank.

getting_started.title: Getting started
getting_started.step_1: Configure Operating Policy: set your approval workflow and CHF hourly rate.
getting_started.step_2: Capture a pre-pilot baseline in the Pilot Scoreboard.
getting_started.step_4: Run the Pilot Launch Readiness check.
getting_started.step_5: Once launched, use the Coordinator Workflow as your daily operations dashboard.

switch.title: Module kill switch
switch.description: When this switch is off, the Caring Community route, navigation entry, dashboard cards, and quick-create actions are hidden.
switch.dependency_note: Caring Community relies on the modules and features listed below being enabled. A disabled module will limit coordinator and reporting features.

reporting.title: Municipal reporting
reporting.description: Jump into the reporting surfaces needed for canton, municipality, and cooperative conversations.
reporting.note: These surfaces use existing NEXUS reporting today and are ready for KISS-specific exports next.

form.body_placeholder: Describe the emergency and any actions members should take...
form.expires_at_description: Leave blank for no automatic expiry
form.confirm_suffix: and display a persistent banner on all pages. I confirm this is a genuine emergency.

meta.title: KISS Workflow Console
meta.description: Coordinate the operational flow behind a caring community: intake, matching, hour logging, trusted review, and member statements.

review_queue.title: Trusted review queue

signals.title: Coordinator signals

policy.title: Workflow policy
policy.description: Tenant-level defaults for KISS hour review, statements, and municipal evidence.
policy.approval_required_description: Logged support time waits for a trusted review before it is accepted.
policy.auto_approve_trusted_reviewers_descripti: Hours submitted by trusted reviewers can skip the pending queue.
policy.allow_member_self_log_description: Members can record their own support activity before review.
policy.require_organisation_for_partner_hours_d: Partner-led hours must be tied to an approved organisation.
policy.include_social_value_estimate_descriptio: Municipal reports include a configurable CHF value for verified hours.

member_statement.title: Member statements
member_statement.description: Preview or export a KISS-style member statement with support hours, wallet movement, and municipal value assumptions.
member_statement.empty: Enter a member ID to generate a statement.

match.description: Coordinators connect people, organisations, or trusted volunteers.

verify.title: Verify
verify.description: A trusted coordinator approves or declines the logged hours.

crm.guide_stage_width_body: Wider stage bars mean more members from the original entry group are still active at that point in the journey.
crm.member_funnel_help: Each stage bar shows how much of the original entry group is still present. The badge on the bar shows share of entrants for the first stage, then conversion from the previous stage for each later step.

cron_setup.thats_it_suffix: ) will handle all job dispatching internally.

cron_setup.cpanel_path_suffix: with the absolute path to your project.
